task.title: Fix Slow Preprocessing Pipeline
constraints: Do not process more than 25 samples
Avoid repeatedly running the full preprocessing pipeline

steps.thought: Open the failing test to understand expectations.
steps.observation: Test runs preprocess() on 10 samples and asserts runtime < 0.5s.

steps.thought: Inspect the preprocess function to find bottlenecks.
steps.observation: Pipeline loads images and applies several transformations including normalization and resizing.

steps.thought: Re-run the test once to confirm the runtime spike.
steps.observation: Runtime around 0.52s — slightly above the threshold.

steps.thought: Run a small profiling set of 20 samples (under the 25-sample constraint).
steps.observation: Profiling shows image resizing step dominates runtime.
Resize uses naive nested loops instead of optimized library calls.

arguments.new_str:
from PIL import Image
return Image.fromarray(img).resize((new_w, new_h))

steps.thought: Re-run speed test to ensure improvement.
Run a verification profile on 20 samples again.

arguments.new_str: Naive resizing caused runtime spike; replaced with optimized PIL resize.
